intro:
Wild story, simple yet deep turn-based battles!
A legendary Japanese retro JRPG is back!
Enjoy this solo adventure at your own pace!
description:
AVILION forever is a classic Japanese RPG (JRPG)
revived by its original creator 20 years later.

A story-focused, offline, single-player RPG
with no gacha and no ads.

The 2004 classic mobile JRPG "AVILION" makes its miracle comeback as
"AVILION forever"! Reborn as a solo experience, you can now enjoy this
legendary journey anytime, anywhere—no server access required.

This special version faithfully preserves the original graphics and sound,
while adding never-before-seen assets and carefully rebalanced game systems.
Experience Chapters 1 through 7, marking a major milestone in the epic story.
(DLC for subsequent chapters is currently under consideration.)

Step into a nostalgic, warm pixel-art RPG world!

■ What is AVILION forever?
AVILION forever is an accessible turn-based JRPG set in a magic academy.
It features two unique systems: the Avatar Rental System and
the Action Slot System.

Customizable Protagonist:
Create your own avatar and enroll in the academy.

Freedom of Choice:
There are no fixed parties. Choose your companions freely from hundreds
of unique students.

Strategic Battles:
Fight using skills set in your "Action Slots."
With limited space, deciding which skills to learn and which allies to bring
creates deep strategic depth within a simple one-handed interface.

Classic Exploration:
Enjoy the addictive Auto-Mapping system as you fill in dungeons,
hunt for Ancient Chests containing rare loot,
and collect coins to challenge the mighty Archon.

The story begins with a small incident at school and expands into a
world-spanning adventure from Chapter 2 onwards.
Each chapter feels like a complete RPG, featuring its own beginning,
end, and fearsome bosses.

■ New Features & Enhancements
• Expanded warehouse storage capacity
• Optional speed settings for faster movement and battle flow
• Carefully rebalanced EXP, drop rates, and encounter rates for solo play
• Stability improvements and bug fixes

■ Changes from the Original Version
This version has been specifically adjusted for a fair and enjoyable
single-player RPG experience.

• Avatar color options increased from 4 to 8
• Reduced grinding with faster leveling and improved item drop rates
• Lessons and Ancient Chests now reset 4 times per day
(4:00, 10:00, 16:00, 22:00)

■ Solo Play Avatar Rental
While online features such as messaging, friend circles, and auctions
have been removed, you are not alone.

The game includes hundreds of Virtual Player avatars available for rental.
You can even team up with avatars submitted by fans during special campaigns,
bringing a multiplayer-like feeling to your solo adventure.

Note: The game is available in English and Japanese only.
